description: Always pin image versions (SHA or semver), never use latest tag
Use containerPort >= 1024 with runAsNonRoot: true, remap via Service port:80 -> targetPort:8080
Liveness probe must use a dedicated lightweight /healthz endpoint, not a heavy business endpoint

trap: Container has no resources block at all
description: Always set both resource requests AND limits on every container

trap: Service selector app: api-svc vs pod label app: api-server
description: Service selector must exactly match pod template labels, mismatch causes silent failure

trap: DATABASE_URL with password stored in ConfigMap
description: Sensitive data (passwords, credentials) must use Secret (with stringData), not ConfigMap
Minimum 2 replicas for availability during rolling updates (zero-downtime)
Set terminationGracePeriodSeconds appropriately (e.g. 30) with preStop hook for graceful drain
Use maxUnavailable: 0 for zero-downtime rolling updates

trap: Labels use app: api-server instead of app.kubernetes.io/* convention
description: Labels must follow app.kubernetes.io/* standard convention for tooling compatibility
Configure readiness probe to control traffic routing (removed from Service endpoints on failure)
Configure startup probe to disable liveness/readiness checks during boot
Pod must set runAsNonRoot: true, runAsUser: 1000, seccompProfile: RuntimeDefault
Container must set allowPrivilegeEscalation: false, readOnlyRootFilesystem: true, drop: [ALL]
Add preStop hook with sleep for graceful connection draining during rolling updates
Create a dedicated ServiceAccount per app, never use default SA in production

trap: ClusterRoleBinding grants cluster-admin to the app
description: Use namespaced Role with least privilege (only needed verbs/resources), not ClusterRole cluster-admin
HPA minReplicas must be >= 2 for availability

trap: HPA targets a Deployment whose containers have no resource requests
description: HPA requires resource requests set on containers to compute utilization ratios
HPA must configure scale-down stabilization window to prevent flapping

trap: NetworkPolicy only has Ingress policyType, no Egress restriction
description: Default deny all ingress AND egress, then allowlist specific paths
NetworkPolicy ingress must restrict to specific podSelector/namespaceSelector, not allow all

trap: Ingress has no TLS configuration or cert-manager annotation
description: Ingress should have TLS termination with cert-manager for automatic certificates

trap: No PodDisruptionBudget defined for the Deployment
description: Every production Deployment needs a PDB (minAvailable: 50%) to survive node drains
Use topologySpreadConstraints to spread pods across zones/nodes and prevent single-point-of-failure

trap: All resources deployed to namespace: default
description: Never deploy to default namespace; use an explicit application namespace
